nasb.text: Arise, walk about the land through its length and breadth; for I will give it to you.”

esv.text: Arise, walk through the length and the breadth of the land, for I will give it to you.”

cnv.text: 你起來，縱橫走遍這地，因為我必把這地賜給你。”

ccb.text: 你起来走遍这片土地，因为我要把这片土地赐给你。”

csbs.text: 起来，纵横走遍这地！要知道，我要把这地赐给你。”
